channel.title: Panagiotis Korovesis on The Space 🌍
channel.description: Recent content in Panagiotis Korovesis on The Space 🌍

item.title: LLaMoT: Leveraging Large Language Models for Entity Resolution
item.author: panoskorovesis@outlook.com (Panos Korovesis)
item.description: An in-depth look at my MSc Thesis on LLaMoT: Utilizing open-source LLMs to redefine Entity Resolution through Prompt-based and Embedding-based Matching.
